entries.statement: Skill in constructing and defending data and AI investment portfolios using risk-adjusted financial frameworks, including expected value of information, NPV, and ROI analysis.
Skill in building executive alignment for data and AI transformation programs, including stakeholder mapping, coalition building, and resistant stakeholder engagement.

Skill in designing transformation roadmaps that sequence capability development logically, with dependencies identified, quick wins positioned early, and long-term structural changes sequenced appropriately.
Skill in designing and executing applied research projects with clear organizational relevance, balancing research rigor with practical applicability.
Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.
Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
Skill in developing enterprise data and AI strategies that connect organizational business objectives to data capabilities, AI initiatives, governance requirements, and measurable value outcomes.
Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
Skill in presenting data and AI strategy, risk, and value to board-level audiences, translating technical complexity into governance-appropriate language and decision frameworks.
Skill in evaluating emerging data and AI technologies for strategic relevance, assessing maturity, organizational fit, competitive impact, and integration requirements before recommending investment.

Skill in managing data and AI investment portfolios across multiple concurrent initiatives, including prioritization frameworks, resource allocation, portfolio performance tracking, and initiative rebalancing.
Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, including commercial terms, roadmap alignment, dependency management, and exit strategy planning.

Skill in influencing organizational decision-makers and cross-functional stakeholders to adopt data-driven approaches, including framing technical value propositions in business terms, building consensus across competing priorities, and overcoming resistance through evidence rather than authority.
